summary: Tested Share to Feed and GPS Fallback features. All 5 features verified - 4 working correctly, 1 bug found and fixed.

ui_bugs.issue: TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'toFixed') when clicking Browse Spots Manually

seed_data_creation: Created test bookings for Kelly Slater to test Share to Feed functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Share to Feed and GPS Fallback features are working. Test credentials: kelly@surf.com / test-shaka for surfer, photographer@surf.com / photo123 for photographer.

share_to_feed_success_toast.details: Toast shows 'Session posted to feed! Friends can join from there. X spots available for crew'

share_to_feed_already_shared_toast.details: Toast shows 'This session is already on your feed! Your friends can see it and join from there.'

share_to_feed_button_state.details: Button changes from 'Post to Feed' to 'Posted to Feed' with green checkmark and 'Shared' badge after successful share

gps_fallback_button_appears.details: 'Browse Spots Manually' button appears when GPS is not active in the booking flow location step

gps_fallback_loads_spots.details: Clicking 'Browse Spots Manually' loads 1447 spots centered on photographer's coverage area with 'No fee' badges

bug_fixed.issue: Changed 'spot.distanceFromUser !== undefined' to 'spot.distanceFromUser != null' to handle null values
bug_fixed.root_cause: The distanceFromUser property was set to null (not undefined) when GPS was not available, causing toFixed() to fail
